brands.name: Apple
brands.description: iPhone, Mac, AirPods, Apple Watch, and Apple accessories.

brands.name: Samsung
brands.description: Galaxy phones, audio, wearables, and mobile accessories.

categories.name: Smartphones
categories.description: Apple iPhone and Samsung Galaxy smartphones.

categories.name: Laptops
categories.description: MacBook Air and MacBook Pro powered by Apple M5 chips.

categories.name: Smartwatches
categories.description: Apple Watch and Samsung Galaxy Watch models.

categories.name: Charging & Cables
categories.description: Official charging cables and wireless chargers.

products.name: iPhone 17
products.short_description: 6.3-inch ProMotion display, A19 chip, and 48MP Dual Fusion camera system.
products.description: iPhone 17 features a 6.3-inch Super Retina XDR display with ProMotion up to 120Hz, the A19 chip, an 18MP Center Stage front camera, and a 48MP Dual Fusion camera system.

products.name: iPhone Air
products.short_description: Apple's thinnest iPhone with a 6.5-inch display and A19 Pro chip.
products.description: iPhone Air combines an exceptionally thin titanium design with a 6.5-inch Super Retina XDR display, ProMotion up to 120Hz, the A19 Pro chip, and a 48MP Fusion camera.

products.name: iPhone 17 Pro
products.short_description: 6.3-inch pro iPhone with A19 Pro and three 48MP Fusion cameras.
products.description: iPhone 17 Pro pairs the A19 Pro chip with a 6.3-inch Super Retina XDR display, a vapor-cooled aluminum unibody, and three 48MP Fusion cameras with up to 8x optical-quality zoom.

products.name: iPhone 17 Pro Max
products.short_description: 6.9-inch flagship iPhone with A19 Pro and the longest iPhone battery life.
products.description: iPhone 17 Pro Max brings the A19 Pro chip, a 6.9-inch Super Retina XDR display, three 48MP Fusion cameras, and up to 8x optical-quality zoom to Apple's largest pro iPhone.

products.name: MacBook Air 13-inch M5
products.short_description: Portable 13-inch MacBook Air with M5, 512GB storage, and up to 18 hours of battery life.
products.description: The 13-inch MacBook Air with M5 starts with 512GB of storage and adds Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, a Liquid Retina display, and up to 18 hours of battery life in a lightweight fanless design.

products.name: MacBook Air 15-inch M5
products.short_description: Roomy 15-inch MacBook Air with M5 and up to 18 hours of battery life.
products.description: The 15-inch MacBook Air with M5 offers a larger Liquid Retina display, standard 512GB storage, Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, and up to 18 hours of battery life in a thin fanless enclosure.

products.name: MacBook Pro 14-inch M5
products.short_description: 14-inch Liquid Retina XDR notebook with M5 and 1TB starting storage.
products.description: The 14-inch MacBook Pro with M5 combines a Liquid Retina XDR display, 12MP Center Stage camera, six-speaker sound, up to 24 hours of battery life, and 1TB of starting storage.

products.name: MacBook Pro 14-inch M5 Pro
products.short_description: Compact pro notebook with M5 Pro, Thunderbolt 5, and 1TB starting storage.
products.description: The 14-inch MacBook Pro with M5 Pro delivers high-performance CPU and GPU cores, Thunderbolt 5, Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, a Liquid Retina XDR display, and up to 24 hours of battery life.

products.name: MacBook Pro 16-inch M5 Pro
products.short_description: 16-inch professional notebook with M5 Pro and 1TB starting storage.
products.description: The 16-inch MacBook Pro with M5 Pro offers a large Liquid Retina XDR display, Thunderbolt 5, Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, 1TB starting storage, and up to 24 hours of battery life.

products.name: MacBook Pro 16-inch M5 Max
products.short_description: Apple's highest-performance 16-inch notebook with M5 Max and 2TB starting storage.
products.description: The 16-inch MacBook Pro with M5 Max is built for demanding professional workflows with high-bandwidth unified memory, Thunderbolt 5, Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, and 2TB of starting storage.

products.name: AirPods 4
products.short_description: Open-fit wireless earbuds with the H2 chip and Personalized Spatial Audio.
products.description: AirPods 4 feature a redesigned open fit, the H2 chip, Voice Isolation, Personalized Spatial Audio, USB-C charging, and an IP54 dust, sweat, and water resistance rating.

products.name: AirPods 4 with Active Noise Cancellation
products.short_description: AirPods 4 with Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Audio, and wireless charging.
products.description: This AirPods 4 model adds Active Noise Cancellation, Transparency mode, Adaptive Audio, Conversation Awareness, and a wireless charging case with a built-in speaker.

products.name: AirPods Pro 3
products.short_description: In-ear AirPods with advanced ANC, heart-rate sensing, and improved fit.
products.description: AirPods Pro 3 deliver stronger in-ear Active Noise Cancellation, a redesigned fit with five ear-tip sizes, heart-rate sensing during workouts, and extended battery life.

products.name: AirPods Max 2
products.short_description: Premium over-ear headphones with high-fidelity audio and Active Noise Cancellation.
products.description: AirPods Max 2 combine a comfortable over-ear design with high-fidelity audio, Active Noise Cancellation, Transparency mode, Personalized Spatial Audio, and USB-C charging.

products.name: Apple Watch Series 11
products.short_description: Thin everyday smartwatch with health insights and up to 24 hours of battery life.
products.description: Apple Watch Series 11 offers an always-on display, comprehensive fitness and health features, 5G cellular options, sleep score, and up to 24 hours of battery life.

products.name: Apple Watch SE 3
products.short_description: Essential Apple Watch features at the most accessible price.
products.description: Apple Watch SE 3 brings core activity, workout, safety, communication, and health features in a lightweight aluminum design with GPS and cellular options.

products.name: Apple Watch Ultra 3
products.short_description: Rugged titanium Apple Watch for endurance, adventure, and water sports.
products.description: Apple Watch Ultra 3 is Apple's most rugged smartwatch, with a titanium case, precision dual-frequency GPS, advanced training features, cellular connectivity, and extended battery life.

products.name: Apple MagSafe Charger (1m)
products.short_description: Qi2-certified magnetic wireless charger with an integrated 1-meter USB-C cable.
products.description: The Apple MagSafe Charger provides magnetic alignment and wireless charging up to 25W with a compatible power adapter. It also supports Qi2 and Qi charging.

products.name: Apple 60W USB-C Charge Cable (1m)
products.short_description: Woven USB-C charge and sync cable supporting up to 60 watts.
products.description: This woven 1-meter USB-C to USB-C cable supports charging up to 60W, USB 2 data transfer, syncing, and fast charging with a compatible USB-C power adapter.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S23
products.short_description: Compact 6.1-inch Galaxy flagship with a 50MP camera and Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 for Galaxy.
products.description: Galaxy S23 features a 6.1-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 Mobile Platform for Galaxy, a 50MP main camera, and a durable IP68-rated design.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S23+
products.short_description: 6.6-inch Galaxy flagship with a 50MP camera and 256GB starting storage.
products.description: Galaxy S23+ pairs a 6.6-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display with Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 for Galaxy, a 50MP main camera, 45W wired charging, and 256GB starting storage.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra
products.short_description: 6.8-inch Galaxy flagship with an integrated S Pen and 200MP camera.
products.description: Galaxy S23 Ultra combines a 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, integrated S Pen, 200MP camera, Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 for Galaxy, and a 5,000mAh battery.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S23 FE
products.short_description: 6.4-inch Galaxy phone with a 50MP camera and flagship-inspired features.
products.description: Galaxy S23 FE offers a 6.4-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, a 50MP high-resolution camera with 3x optical zoom, a 4,500mAh battery, and IP68 water and dust resistance.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy Buds4
products.short_description: Open-fit earbuds with 24-bit Hi-Fi audio, ANC, and intelligent controls.
products.description: Galaxy Buds4 use an open-fit design with an 11mm dynamic speaker, 24-bit Hi-Fi audio support, Active Noise Cancellation, voice controls, and a compact transparent charging case.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro
products.short_description: Canal-fit premium earbuds with enhanced two-way speakers and adaptive ANC.
products.description: Galaxy Buds4 Pro feature an enhanced two-way speaker system, 24-bit Hi-Fi audio support, adaptive Active Noise Cancellation, a secure canal fit, and intelligent hands-free controls.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy Watch8
products.short_description: Thin everyday Galaxy watch with personalized wellness and running insights.
products.description: Galaxy Watch8 features Samsung's cushion design, a Super AMOLED display, dual-frequency GPS, advanced health tracking, Wear OS 6, and One UI 8 Watch.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy Watch8 Classic
products.short_description: 46mm Galaxy smartwatch with a rotating bezel and Quick Button.
products.description: Galaxy Watch8 Classic combines a 46mm cushion-shaped case with a rotating bezel, Quick Button, Super AMOLED display, 64GB of storage, and personalized health insights.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra
products.short_description: Durable titanium Galaxy watch with dual-frequency GPS and extended battery life.
products.description: Galaxy Watch Ultra is Samsung's most durable smartwatch, with a titanium cushion design, dual-frequency GPS, 10ATM water resistance, 64GB storage, and advanced fitness tracking.

products.name: Samsung USB-C to USB-C Cable
products.short_description: Official 1.8-meter 3A USB-C cable for charging and data transfer.
products.description: Samsung's 1.8-meter USB-C to USB-C cable supports up to 3A charging and reliable data transfer for compatible Galaxy phones, tablets, earbuds, and other USB-C devices.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy Watch Fast Charger
products.short_description: Official USB-C magnetic fast charger for Galaxy Watch5 and later.
products.description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch Fast Charger uses a compact magnetic charging puck and USB-C connection for fast charging on Galaxy Watch5 series and later models.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S26
products.short_description: Compact 6.3-inch Galaxy flagship with a 50MP camera and Galaxy AI.
products.description: Galaxy S26 combines a 6.3-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, a 50MP wide camera, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 for Galaxy, a 4,300mAh battery, and deeply integrated Galaxy AI features.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S26+
products.short_description: Large 6.7-inch Galaxy flagship with a 50MP camera and 4,900mAh battery.
products.description: Galaxy S26+ pairs a 6.7-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display with a 50MP wide camera, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 for Galaxy, a 4,900mAh battery, and advanced Galaxy AI tools.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
products.short_description: 6.9-inch Galaxy Ultra with a 200MP camera, S Pen, and built-in Privacy Display.
products.description: Galaxy S26 Ultra features a 6.9-inch display with built-in Privacy Display, a 200MP wide camera, integrated S Pen, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 for Galaxy, and a 5,000mAh battery.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7
products.short_description: Slim foldable with an expansive 8-inch main display and 200MP camera.
products.description: Galaxy Z Fold7 opens to an expansive 8-inch main display and combines a wider cover screen, 200MP wide camera, Snapdragon 8 Elite for Galaxy, 4,400mAh battery, and foldable-optimized Galaxy AI.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip7
products.short_description: Pocketable Galaxy foldable with a flexible main display and 50MP camera.
products.description: Galaxy Z Flip7 folds into a compact pocketable design while offering a large edge-to-edge cover screen, a flexible main display, 50MP wide camera, and Galaxy AI experiences designed for the Flip form factor.
